POS RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE, N.A.
ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE, N.A. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT TRANG, JENNY $7,140.50 PRINCIPAL, $220.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,360.50, SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, N.A. (AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE, N.A.) PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-25-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
